'''tasungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yagouarundi|yagouarundi]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-s-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yagouarundi|yagouarundi]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tasungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæsingith|tæsingith]] || [[word:tæsingij|tæsingij]] || [[word:tæsingish|tæsingish]] || [[word:tæsingi|tæsingi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tasusunguth|tasusunguth]] || [[word:tasusunguj|tasusunguj]] || [[word:tasusungush|tasusungush]] || [[word:tasusungu|tasusungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tasunguth|tasunguth]] || [[word:tasunguj|tasunguj]] || [[word:tasungush|tasungush]] || [[word:tasungu|tasungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tasufnguth|tasufnguth]] || [[word:tasufnguj|tasufnguj]] || [[word:tasufngush|tasufngush]] || [[word:tasufnguf|tasufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tasunguthu|tasunguthu]] || [[word:tasunguju|tasunguju]] || [[word:tasungushu|tasungushu]] || [[word:tasunguku|tasunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tasunguth|tasunguth]] || [[word:tasunguj|tasunguj]] || [[word:tasungush|tasungush]] || [[word:tasungu|tasungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tasunguthul|tasunguthul]] || [[word:tasungujul|tasungujul]] || [[word:tasungushul|tasungushul]] || [[word:tasungukul|tasungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tasunguthuthu|tasunguthuthu]] || [[word:tasungujuju|tasungujuju]] || [[word:tasungushushu|tasungushushu]] || [[word:tasunguku|tasunguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tasunguthun|tasunguthun]] || [[word:tasungujun|tasungujun]] || [[word:tasungushun|tasungushun]] || [[word:tasungukun|tasungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tasunguthuoro|tasunguthuoro]] || [[word:tasungujuoro|tasungujuoro]] || [[word:tasungushuoro|tasungushuoro]] || [[word:tasungukuoro|tasungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
